title: malaxis schliebenii
intro: Malaxis schliebenii, also known as the Schlieben's Malaxis, is a species of orchid native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Malaxis schliebenii include treating skin conditions such as eczema and wounds, as well as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues. Malaxis schliebenii is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion by boiling the roots in water, and can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
